title: ATR teacher review record
description: A dated teacher review of one provisional technique. Never overwrites the provisional record in techniques.json; layers on top as a contribution event, keyed to the reviewing teacher (CARE/provenance stance).

id.description: review:<technique-id>:<reviewed_by-slug> -- one current record per (technique, teacher); re-review updates in place

verdict.description: confirmed: parse was right · corrected: fields below are the teacher's truth · skip: not yet judged · rejected: not a valid technique entry (OCR noise, a section header, not a technique)

name_romaji.description: teacher-approved romaji name (romanized, not Japanese script)

keyframes.description: the teacher-corrected image sequence (added/removed/reordered), or null to keep the provisional sequence

caption.description: teacher's label for this frame (e.g. the count, or a phase name)

note.description: the deep layer: what this technique is that the name does not carry (connection/musubi, timing, quality of kuzushi). The only authored source for the qualitative layer.

reviewed_by.description: person:<slug> of the reviewing teacher, keyed to the data map
